paper_title: Perceptions of Key Stakeholders on Competencies in Human Resources Call Centre

methods.description: This method involves gathering data through various forms of interviews to understand the perceptions of key stakeholders regarding critical competencies in a Human Resources Call Centre.

steps.description: Conduct focus group interviews with Human Resources Call Centre agents.
steps.searchable_summary: facilitate focus group interviews with HR Call Centre agents

steps.description: Conduct individual interviews with Human Resources Call Centre supervisors.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct individual interviews with HR Call Centre supervisors

steps.description: Conduct telephonic interviews with customers of the Human Resources Call Centre.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct telephonic interviews with HR Call Centre customers
inputs: Customers of Human Resources Call Centre

methods.description: This method applies Miles and Huberman's transcendental realism to analyze data by reducing, displaying, and drawing conclusions to identify lawful and stable relationships among social phenomena.

steps.description: Apply data reduction by summarizing data after each focus group interview.
steps.searchable_summary: summarize data after each focus group interview

steps.description: Perform coding and memoing to find themes, clusters, and patterns.
steps.searchable_summary: code and memo data to find themes and patterns

steps.description: Display data in diagrams and tables to aid analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: create diagrams and tables for data display

steps.description: Draw and verify conclusions based on data analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: draw and verify conclusions from analyzed data
